word: G3832 - πανοικί - panoikí - pan-oy-kee' - With all his house

sections.paragraph:
- Original: πανοικί

- Transliteration: Panoiki

- Phonetic: pan-oy-kee'

- Definition:

1. with all (his) house, with (his) whole family

- Origin: from G3956 and G3624

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Adverb

- Strong's: Adverb from G3956 and G3624; with the whole family: - with all his house.
